disclaimer: Personal signal tracker. Counts from WHO DON and news reports — verify at primary sources before citing.

regions.name: Ushuaia, Argentina
regions.notes: Ship departure point. Dutch couple likely exposed here or nearby before boarding April 1.

regions.name: Saint Helena
regions.notes: Case 1 (Dutch man) died on board April 11, body removed here. Case 2 (wife) deboarded April 24, flew to Johannesburg.

regions.name: Ascension Island
regions.notes: Case 3 (British national) evacuated April 27, flown to Johannesburg ICU.

regions.name: Cape Verde (MV Hondius)
regions.notes: Ship anchored off Praia. German woman died May 2. 3 suspected cases with mild symptoms remain on board.

regions.name: Johannesburg, South Africa
regions.notes: Case 2 (Dutch woman) died April 26 — PCR confirmed. Case 3 (British national) in ICU, improving. NICD lab confirmation site.

regions.name: Netherlands
regions.notes: 3 patients including ship doctor airlifted from Cape Verde May 5. Ship owned by Dutch company Oceanwide Expeditions.

regions.name: Zurich, Switzerland
regions.notes: Male passenger confirmed Andes strain, treated at University Hospital Zurich.

regions.name: France
regions.notes: French national monitored as contact case — shared Airlink flight with Case 2 from Saint Helena to Johannesburg.

regions.name: Canary Islands, Spain
regions.notes: Ship heading here for passenger disembarkation from May 11. Regional govt opposed but Spain approved.
